commands.review_summary:
The PR changes default text `openclaw status` to request live `channels.status` data outside `--all`/`--deep`, and updates the status scan test to pass that live payload into `buildChannelsTable`.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests +11. Total +11 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main disables `includeLiveChannelStatus` for default text status and the adjacent test asserts no `channels.status` call. I did not run a live configured gateway reproduction.
